ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the rugby team */,
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ground where the team plays */,
  "previous_season_rank" TEXT /* The team's rank in the previous season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Short description of the team */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_id") REFERENCES grounds ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grounds" (
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground */,
  "ground_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the stadium */,
  "city_area" TEXT /* City or area where the stadium is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the stadium */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the stadium's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the stadium's location */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the league takes place */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level or tier of the league */,
  "promoted_to_league" INTEGER /* Reference to the league that teams are promoted to */,
  "relegated_to_league" INTEGER /* Reference to the league that teams are relegated to */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Short description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "event" TEXT /* Notable events or outcomes of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the championship */,
  "relegated_teams" TEXT /* List of teams that were relegated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Short report of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., stadium, pitch) */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the referee (e.g., scrums, lineouts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team sponsored */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league sponsored */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., kit, stadium) */,
  "contract_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sponsorship contract in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the ticket is for */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the match */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from ticket sales */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., adult, child, concession) */,
  "seating_area" TEXT /* Seating area where the ticket is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan's favorite team */,
  "fan_since" INTEGER /* Year the fan started supporting the team */,
  "season_ticket_holder" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fan is a season ticket holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_favorite_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match covered */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media coverage (e.g., TV, Radio, Online) */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of the media coverage */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* Number of viewers who watched the coverage */,
  "broadcast_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage was broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the official is involved in */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, assistant referee) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a match official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coach, physio) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
